title: Deathbans
description: Bans a player upon death for a configurable amount of time
body:
# Deathbans

A plugin that bans players upon death for a configurable amount of time. Also has the option to spawn a lightning bolt (without damage) on the player's death location.

## Instructions

1. Download the plugin or compile it yourself
2. Drag and drop the plugin into your server plugins folder
3. Run or reload your server
4. The configuration for this plugin is found in `plugins/Abbys-Deathbans/config.yml`
